title: Heart Ore
description: Replaces vanilla ores with cute colored hearts
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6183143d910b48ccaf1cc1d9737546715f11e776.png) *** This pack simply replaces all vanilla ore textures with colored hearts, matching each ore's unique palette. Designed for version 1.20.1, but may be compatible with some older and newest MC versions
If you have any trouble with MC version and this pack - contact me and I'll try to help and make working version ### **List of edited blocks:** **Stone & Deepslate ore:** coal, copper, iron, gold, diamond, redstone, emerald, lapis lazuli
**Nether:** quartz, gold *** ### **Support & Contact:** Love this pack? Support me on [Boosty](https://boosty.to/reterica)!
For any questions or suggestions, reach me out via my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/QsezmMbPQF)
